layout.layout_rhythm: vellum: low density, high formality. Deep navy canvas with warm-yellow Cormorant serifs and a single dusty teal accent. A quiet, scholarly aesthetic.
layout.spacing_rhythm: Reuse source spacing tokens and grid gaps: {"pad_x": "6vw", "pad_y": "6vh", "gap_lg": "5vh", "gap_md": "3vh", "gap_sm": "1.5vh"}

template_json_typography.style: transitional serif as the structural display face, paired with clean DM Sans body and Courier Prime mono for attributions and labels; bilingual EN/CN support

design_tokens_typography.style: transitional serif as the structural display face, paired with clean DM Sans body and Courier Prime mono for attributions and labels; bilingual EN/CN support

typography.typography_role: transitional serif as the structural display face, paired with clean DM Sans body and Courier Prime mono for attributions and labels; bilingual EN/CN support

design_intent_font_pairing: LXGW WenKai or NSC at the same teal color
LXGW WenKai TC is the Traditional Chinese cut on Google Fonts
cjk_policy.known_degradation: LXGW WenKai has only a single weight (regular). The system's h3 (weight 500 italic) cannot step up in weight in CJK — the visual hierarchy step must come from size alone (h2 4vw → h3 2.4vw). For decks that need stronger sub-headline emphasis, consider NSC 500 as an h3 alternate.

template_json_palette.description: deep periwinkle navy canvas with warm yellow serif type and one dusty-teal accent for quote marks; a single coherent palette across every slide, no inverted theme

visual_effects.notes: Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: tinted_card.

Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: image_crop.
Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: paper_texture.
Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: window_chrome.
Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: bold_border.

image.strategy: Preserve source image regions and screenshot-backed composition; runtime generation must use traceable online/approved image assets, not local decorative placeholders.

font_and_typography_constraints: italic is source-aware but CJK fake italic is forbidden; use color/weight fallback when unavailable
letter spacing is preserved for Latin labels and reset/softened for CJK

extraction_receipt.claim_boundary: visual contract only; not a renderer implementation or fidelity pass

display.mapping_reason: 保留 Cormorant Garamond 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Serif Pro 与 思源宋体。

body.mapping_reason: 保留 DM Sans 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

label.mapping_reason: 保留 Courier Prime 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

metric.mapping_reason: 保留 Courier Prime 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

font_strategy.mapping_reason: 根据 design.md/template.html/template.json 中的 font-family 与 typography token 提取源字体；运行时按 Slide/系统/Adobe/思源可用字体降级。

italic.source_usage: source uses italic/font-style or italic-family tokens
italic.fallback_when_unavailable: use color_shift or weight_shift; do not fake CJK italic
italic.loss_notes: Satori/Slide may not provide exact Google italic face; record as visual approximation.

underline.source_usage: source uses underline/text-decoration or hairline emphasis
underline.mapped_decoration: native underline only for actual text-decoration source usage
underline.fallback_shape: 1px-3px rule or border accent when underline font rendering is unavailable

line_through.source_usage: not present in source; default no line-through

emphasis.color_shift: use source accent color roles only
emphasis.font_family_switch: only switch between mapped display/body/label/metric roles from this family
emphasis.weight_shift: increase one role step within font_weight_scale
emphasis.style_shift: italic only when source_usage requires and CJK fallback is safe

text_decoration_policy.underline.color.raw_value: notes carry 0.01em (tighter than chrome labels). Bold within body is not used. Underline is not used. Emphasis inside body text is achieved by the same roman-in-emphasis-yellow pattern as inside headlines — switch font-style from italic to upright at a heavier weight in the brighter yellow. ## Lay

italic.raw_value: ith warm chartreuse-yellow type (#E8D85C) floating centered on it, every slide. Italic Cormorant Garamond carries every headline at all sizes — the italic serif is the personality, against the bold colorfield. DM Sans handles body in a quiet supporting role.
